message:
fix(core): SafetyTier::Forbidden must always deny regardless of provenance

Previously Forbidden was grouped with Dangerous/Critical in
can_drive_operation(), allowing clean-provenance requests to succeed.
This contradicts the spec definition "never allowed under any
circumstances". Separated Forbidden into its own match arm that
always returns Err(ProvenanceViolation::ForbiddenOperation).

Added OperationForbidden variant to DecisionReasonCode and mapping
in from_provenance_violation for complete error pipeline coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
